_comment: Single source of truth for custom dashboard templates. Read by frontend/src/customTemplates/index.js (UI registry) and backend/src/services/search/customTemplates.js (search matcher). Adding a new template requires (1) adding an entry here, (2) dropping the React component in this folder, and (3) wiring slug -> { icon, component } in index.js. Search will pick the new template up automatically — no backend edit needed.

templates.title: What's Upcoming
